skip_reason: Relies on 'window.__INITIAL_STATE__.$_closet.listingsPostData.data' being populated and '.tiles_container > div[data-et-prop-listing_id]' tile elements matching those listing IDs being rendered. This data shape is specific to a closet page with active listings loaded client-side, and isn't guaranteed stable over time.
notes: Passive - V9 page modifier. Reads listing 'status_changed_at' dates from window.__INITIAL_STATE__.$_closet.listingsPostData.data and appends a '.pm-date-v9' div with ISO+local timestamps to each matching listing tile. 🚨 flag if within 7 days. After stamping, adds a '.myosint-v9-badge' attribution badge. Alerts if no matching listings are found.

checks.text_contains: Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training
